prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2025年约第79名、2026年约第80名，属全国百强理工类高校，层次稳定；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音综合热度排名第77位，评价为一般；2025年投档异常信号显示热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考，对报考心理有一定负面影响；共享合肥工业大学主校区学科评估结果，管理科学与工程为A级，在工科领域具有较强竞争力；招生专业涵盖机械工程、电气工程、软件工程等热门工科方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大；该校位于安徽省宣城市，非本省高校，在陕西招生占比约1.8%（2025年），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（23%）与陕西物理类考生大幅增加（19.7%）的相互抵消效应，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，竞争压力略有缓解；但声誉偏负面及2025年投档异常信号对报考热度有抑制作用。预测2026年最低位次约25395名，区间24895–25895名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 19009 → 20095 → 22801 → 22482, showing an overall backward trend, peaking at 23019 in 2023 and slightly recovering in the last two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 22482; the provincial science (physics category) plan was 73 in 2021, 72 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 78 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 96, an increase of about 23% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 79th in 2025 and 80th in 2026 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top 100 national science and engineering universities, with a stable level; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 77th, rated as average; abnormal signals in 2025 admissions show a sharp drop in popular major admission scores and some majors with no applicants, which has a certain negative impact on application psychology; shares the discipline evaluation results of the main campus of Hefei University of Technology, with Management Science and Engineering rated A, showing strong competitiveness in engineering fields; enrollment majors include popular engineering directions such as Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Software Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended; the number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, a significant expansion in candidate scale; the university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university, with a recruitment proportion in Shaanxi of about 1.8% (2025), belonging to cross-provincial recruitment, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (23%) and the substantial increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates (19.7%) offset each other, with the expansion slightly larger than the candidate increase, easing competition pressure; however, the negative reputation and abnormal admission signals in 2025 suppress application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 25395, with a range of 24895–25895.

Popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Software Engineering are highly competitive and should be filled carefully based on your own ranking.

学校层次与声誉.text: It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an average evaluation. 专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the examinee pool and intensified competition.
